title: Add member testimonials section with 6 reviews

requirements.summary: Update testimonials section to display 6 specific member reviews with names, dates, ratings, and detailed feedback
acceptanceCriteria: Section displays heading 'What Our Members Say' with subtitle about satisfied members at Bodyshape Fitness
All 6 testimonials are displayed with complete text, reviewer names, months, and 5-star ratings
Section includes '5-Star Rated by Our Members' indicator
Reviews maintain chronological order from September 2025 to April 2025

file_operations.description: Replace existing review data with 6 new testimonials: Neil L. (September 2025) praising equipment superiority and Anthony; Sarah M. (August 2025) highlighting 24/7 access and clean equipment; Mike T. (July 2025) mentioning 5+ years membership and great community; Jennifer K. (June 2025) praising clean facility and 24/7 access; David R. (May 2025) noting incredible equipment selection and spotless facility; Amanda P. (April 2025) welcoming staff and modern equipment. All reviews are 5-star ratings. Maintain existing TypeScript interface structure with reviewer, rating, text, and date fields.

Update component to ensure heading reads 'What Our Members Say' with subtitle about satisfied members at Bodyshape Fitness. Add '5-Star Rated by Our Members' indicator. Verify the component renders all 6 reviews from reviews.ts data file in chronological order (September 2025 to April 2025). Maintain existing responsive grid layout and star rating display. Preserve current styling approach consistent with the rest of the application.
